page_metadata.biotools__summary: Pathling is a set of tools that make it easier to use clinical terminology and FHIR® within health data analytics. It is built on Apache Spark, and includes both language libraries and a server implementation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Pathling is a set of tools that make it easier to use clinical terminology and FHIR® within health data analytics. It is built on Apache Spark, and includes both language libraries and a server implementation.
